---
title: "Crop Growth"
author: "Cooper Riggs, Adam Bitner, & Stockton Nelson"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Setup

```{r}
#Downloading Libraries
library(tidyverse)

#Bringing in Data
potato <- vroom::vroom("PotatoCWSI.csv") |>
  janitor::clean_names() |>
  rename(x = point_x,
         y = point_y,
         eca = eca_shallow)
```

## Code

```{r}

```
